Title: Iran, US announce framework deal to end war
Subhead: The agreement, which is set to be signed on June 19 in Switzerland, lays out the principles for ending the fighting, ahead of a 60-day round of negotiations on Iran's nuclear program, enriched uranium stockpiles and the lifting of US sanctions.

Title: Europeans hope to put war in Ukraine back on Trump's agenda at G7 in France
Swiss voters reject initiative to cap population, latest in a string of far-right anti-immigration proposals
US imposes its domination on part of Latin America
Subhead: Most Latin American countries, even non-aligned ones, have folded to the Trump administration's demands. Washington has not hesitated to use threats of sanctions or visa withdrawals to push its interests, with little regard for the rule of law.

Title: UK to ban social media for under-16s, says Starmer
Subhead: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X would be banned for under-16s, saying the platforms were 'designed to be addictive.'

Title: Nicolas Kssis-Martov, sports historian: 'Football has always embodied the political stakes of the left'
Subhead: In his latest book, the journalist delivers an impassioned work centered on key figures and historical moments, rooting football in a progressive vision of hope.

Title: Universal basic income, the utopian idea resurging in Silicon Valley
Subhead: As artificial intelligence threatens to wipe out jobs, the idea of a basic income paid to everyone without conditions is resurfacing. But do tech CEOs share the same motivations as the philosophers and economists who championed it?

Josh O'Connor, star of Spielberg's 'Disclosure Day,' wants to 'cultivate his garden'
Subhead: At 36, he is one of the most sought-after actors in both independent cinema and major Hollywood productions. In just a few years, the British artist, who is passionate about gardening, has put his delicate masculinity and subtle acting style to work for a wide range of characters, from a lovesick farmer to Prince Charles or a priest.

Title: Killing of Lyhanna: What we know about the previous accusations against the suspect
Subhead: While awaiting the findings of the inquiries by the national gendarmerie's internal affairs body and the Justice Ministry's oversight authority, Le Monde has compiled the established facts and the outstanding questions surrounding the background of the suspect in the 11-year-old girl's murder.

Title: For Trump's 80th birthday, Dana White brings mixed martial arts to the White House
Subhead: By staging a fight night for his birthday on Sunday, the US president is cementing his 25-year friendship with the head of the Ultimate Fighting Championship. He is also confirming his vision of politics as a violent spectacle between winners and losers.
